review.note: AI-drafted first pass - SME review required before production

sources.title: Black Nationalist Politics and the Dilemma of the Second World War
Afrikaners and the Second World War by Rodney Warwick
Anti-Fascism in South Africa 1933-1945, and its Legacies by Jonathan Hyslop
Gen. J.B.M. Hertzog is forced to resign as premier after his motion of neutrality in World War II is defeated in parliament
The charter of the United Nations is adopted in San Francisco, with SA prime minister Gen. Smuts present

slides.title: IMfazwe Yehlabathi Yesibini (1939-1945)
slides.lead: Eyona mfazwe ibulala kakhulu embalini yoluntu - nendlela efike ngayo kude eMzantsi Afrika naseAfrika iphela.

media.alt: Isithunzi somephu wehlabathi onqanyulwa yimichokozo, phezu kwecala elimnyama nelikhanyayo, ubonisa ihlabathi elisemfazweni.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#2b2b33'/><rect width='320' height='90' fill='#3a3a45'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='60' fill='#4a5a6a'/><path d='M120 70 q20 -14 42 0 q22 -8 38 6 M110 100 q30 12 60 0 q28 10 50 -2' stroke='#7a8b5a' stroke-width='6' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M40 30 L110 70' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M280 30 L210 70' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M60 150 L120 118' stroke='#e8a13a' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M260 150 L200 118' stroke='#e8a13a' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qala ngokubuza abafundi ukuba yintoni abasele beyazi ngeMfazwe Yehlabathi Yesibini - iifilimu, amabali osapho, iindawo zenkumbulo. Misela izimvo ezimbini ezinkulu zesi sifundo: (1) yayiyimfazwe yehlabathi liphela enezizathu ezicacileyo neenguqu ezibalulekileyo, kwaye (2) yayingekho 'phaya' eYurophu kuphela - abantu baseMzantsi Afrika nabanye baseAfrika balwa, bafa baza batshintsha imbali ngenxa yayo. Khumbuza abafundi ukuba imfazwe yehlabathi ithetha ukulwa kumazwekazi amaninzi ngaxeshanye.

slides.title: Izizathu zeMfazwe Yehlabathi Yesibini
slides.lead: IMfazwe Yesibini yakhula ivela kwimicimbi engagqitywanga yeMfazwe Yehlabathi Yokuqala.

blocks.text: Emva kweMfazwe Yehlabathi Yokuqala, i**Treaty of Versailles (1919)** yayohlwaya iJamani ngeentlawulo ezikhulu nomhlaba elawulahlekelwa nguwo. Xa i**Great Depression** (ukuwa okukhulu koqoqosho) yazisa intswela-ngqesho enkulu ngeminyaka yee-1930s, abantu abanomsindo nabaphelelweyo bajika baya koozwilakhe ababathembisa ukwenza amazwe abo aphinde abe namandla.

items: U**Adolf Hitler** neqela lamaNazi bathabatha ulawulo eJamani ngo-1933, beshumayela ubuhlanga nempindezelo.
Oozwilakhe eItali (uMussolini) namajoni-mkhosi eJapan babefuna ukwakha iimpuma-ngqondo (ii-empire) ngamandla.
ILeague of Nations yayibuthathaka kakhulu ukunqanda ubundlobongela, kwaye amanye amazwe azama ukuphepha imfazwe ngokunikezela (i-appeasement).

slides.notes: Zoba umgca wonobangela nesiphumo: uxolo olulukhuni + ukudilika koqoqosho + impendulo ebuthathaka yamazwe ehlabathi = ukunyuka koozwilakhe abanobundlobongela. Chaza i-'appeasement' ngendlela elula - iBritane neFransi bavumela uHitler ukuba aqhawule imithetho, benethemba lokuba uya kuyeka. Akayekanga. Buyela kwisihloko sika-Grade 8 esiyiMfazwe Yehlabathi Yokuqala ukuze abafundi babone unxibelelwano phakathi kweemfazwe ezimbini.

slides.title: Ukuqhambuka kwemfazwe
slides.lead: Ngomhla woku-1 kuSeptemba 1939 iJamani yahlasela iPoland, ihlabathi laphinda laba semfazweni.

blocks.text: Emva kokuthabatha i-Austria ne-Czechoslovakia, iJamani yahlasela i**Poland ngomhla woku-1 kuSeptemba 1939**. Kwiintsuku ezimbini kamva iBritane neFransi zabhengeza imfazwe ngokuchasene neJamani. Uhlaselo olukhawulezayo lweJamani lweetanki neenqwelo-moya lwabizwa ngokuba yi**Blitzkrieg** ('imfazwe yombane').

items: Phakathi ku-1940 iJamani yayiyoyisile iFransi kunye nenxalenye enkulu yeNtshona Yurophu.
Amacala amabini aza kwaziwa ngokuba yi**Axis** (iJamani, iItali, iJapan) kunye ne**Allies** (iBritane, iFransi, kamva iUSSR ne-USA).
IBritane ne-empire yayo - kubandakanya noMzantsi Afrika - ngoku babemi ngokuchasene neJamani yamaNazi.

media.alt: Imichokozo ekhukuliza phezu komephu olula weYurophu ubonisa uhlaselo olukhawulezayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='40' y='30' width='160' height='100' rx='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='96' y='30' width='40' height='100' fill='#9aa77f'/><path d='M60 80 L150 80' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='8' marker-end='url(#a)'/><path d='M150 80 l-16 -8 v16 z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M70 55 L130 55' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M130 55 l-14 -7 v14 z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M70 105 L130 105' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6'/><path d='M130 105 l-14 -7 v14 z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Misela ngokuqinileyo umhla wokuqala: 1 kuSeptemba 1939. Chaza i-Blitzkrieg ngomfanekiso - iitanki neenqwelo-moya ezijula-bhombu ezihamba ngokukhawuleza kangangokuba abakhuseli babengakwazi ukuzilungiselela. Yenza kucace ukuba kwakutheni uMzantsi Afrika ubandakanyeke: njengenxalenye ye-British Empire neCommonwealth, umbuzo wokungena emfazweni wehla ngqo epalamente yaseMzantsi Afrika, esiyi-slide elandelayo.

slides.title: Iindawo ezinkulu zemfazwe
slides.lead: Ukulwa kwasasazeka kwimimandla emithathu emikhulu, okanye 'ii-theatres', zehlabathi.

blocks.heading: IYurophu
blocks.text: IJamani yayilwa neBritane entshona kwaye, ukusukela ngo-1941, neSoviet Union empuma - eyona mfazwe yasemhlabeni inkulu embalini.

blocks.heading: IMntla Afrika
blocks.text: Imikhosi yama-Allies neye-Axis yayilwa kulo lonke intlango isilwela ulawulo lwe-Suez Canal neoyile. Abantu baseMzantsi Afrika balwa apha.

blocks.heading: IAsia nePacific
blocks.text: Emva kokuba iJapan ihlasele iPearl Harbor ngoDisemba 1941, i-USA yangena emfazweni yaza yalwa neJapan kulo lonke uLwandle iPacific.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa iikhadi ezintathu ukunika abafundi umephu wengqondo. Gxininisa ukuba ezi theatres zazinxibelelene: ukoyiswa kwenye indawo kwakuchaphazela ezinye. Khomba iMntla Afrika ngokukodwa, kuba yindawo apho amajoni amaninzi aseMzantsi Afrika akhonza khona. Qaphela ixesha elibalulekileyo apho i-USA yangena khona emva kwePearl Harbor (7 kaDisemba 1941), okwatshintsha ibhalansi ngasekhosi lwe-Allies.

slides.title: Iindawo zoguquko zemfazwe

blocks.alt: Ithlelo lexesha leendawo zoguquko ezibalulekileyo zeMfazwe Yehlabathi Yesibini ukususela ngo-1939 ukuya ku-1945.

events.label: IJamani ihlasela iUSSR; iJapan ihlasela iPearl Harbor, i-USA iyangena
Iimfazwe zaseStalingrad naseEl Alamein ziguqula ityh eli
I-D-Day: ama-Allies ehla eFransi ngomhla we-6 kaJuni
IJamani iyanikezela (Meyi); iibhombu zenyukliya, iJapan iyanikezela (Agasti)

slides.notes: I-'turning point' (indawo yoguquko) ngumzuzu otshintsha icala lemfazwe. Gqamisa u-1942 njengonyaka apho ityheli laguquka khona: iStalingrad yayinqanda iJamani empuma, kwaye iEl Alamein (apho abantu baseMzantsi Afrika balwa khona) yanqanda iJamani eMntla Afrika. Cela abafundi baqaphele indlela imfazwe eyasasazeka ngayo ngaphandle ukususela ngo-1939 yaza yabuya yavala kwiJamani neJapan ngo-1945.

slides.title: IHolocaust
slides.lead: AmaNazi enza ukubulawa okucwangcisiweyo kwabantu abangamaJuda abazizigidi ezithandathu.

blocks.text: AmaNazi ayekholelwa ukuba ezinye 'iintlanga' zazingcono kunezinye. Ahluthela amaJuda amalungelo awo, awanyanzela angena kwii-ghetto, aza abulala malunga nezi**gidi ezithandathu zamaJuda** kwiinkampu zoxinaniso nezokubulala njengeAuschwitz. Olu bulala luthiwa yi**Holocaust** (ngesiHebhere, i-*Shoah*).

items: AmaNazi abulala kwakhona abantu bakwaRoma, abantu abakhubazekileyo, abachasi bepolitiki nabanye.
IHolocaust ibonisa apho ubuhlanga nentiyo bunokukhokelela khona xa urhulumente enamandla apheleleyo.
Emva kwemfazwe, ihlabathi lathembisa ukuba 'akusayi kuphinda kwenzeke' laza laqala ukubhala imithetho emitsha yamalungelo oluntu.

media.alt: Idangatye elinye lekhandlela ebumnyameni, uphawu lwenkumbulo yamaxhoba eHolocaust.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 160 180' role='img'><rect width='160' height='180' fill='#2b2b33'/><rect x='66' y='96' width='28' height='64' rx='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='60' y='156' width='40' height='10' rx='2' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M80 58 q-14 20 0 34 q14 -14 0 -34 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M80 70 q-7 12 0 22 q7 -10 0 -22 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha esi slide ngononophelo nangokuzimisela. Gcina inqanaba lokufunda lilula kodwa ungayithambisi inyaniso: oku kwakukukubulawa okucwangcisiweyo, okwemveliso, kwezigidi zabantu abamsulwa. Kunxibelelanise noko abafundi baya kukufunda ngobuhlanga eMzantsi Afrika - ingozi yokufundisa ukuba iqela elinye labantu lixabiseke ngaphantsi kunelinye. Le yindawo elungileyo yokunxibelelanisa phambili neUniversal Declaration of Human Rights (1948).

slides.title: UMzantsi Afrika ugqiba ekubeni alwe
slides.lead: NgoSeptemba 1939 ipalamente yaseMzantsi Afrika kwafuneka ikhethe: ukungathathi cala, okanye ukungenela ama-Allies?

blocks.text: INkulumbuso u**J.B.M. Hertzog** wayefuna uMzantsi Afrika ungathathi cala, kodwa isekela lakhe u**Jan Smuts** wayefuna ukulwa ecaleni kweBritane. Ngomhla we-4 kaSeptemba 1939 ipalamente yavotela imfazwe. UHertzog warhoxa, waza u**Smuts waba yiNkulumbuso** nenkokeli ephezulu yama-Allies.

items: Ivoti yahlukanisa kakhulu ipolitiki yabamhlophe phakathi kwama-Afrikaner axhasa imfazwe nawachasene nayo.
Umkhosi waseMzantsi Afrika wawumncinci ngo-1939 kodwa wakhula ngokukhawuleza ngamavolontiya.
Akukho mntu eMzantsi Afrika owanyanzelwa (conscripted) ukuba alwe phesheya - amajoni azithandela ngokwawo.

media.alt: Igumbi lepalamente elinevoti yesandla esiphakanyisiweyo kunye nomngxunya wokwahlula.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='40' width='80' height='90' rx='4' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='130' y='40' width='80' height='90' rx='4' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='116' y='34' width='8' height='102' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='50' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='72' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='94' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='50' cy='84' r='6'/><circle cx='72' cy='84' r='6'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='150' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='172' cy='60' r='6'/><circle cx='194' cy='60' r='6'/></g><rect x='68' y='40' width='4' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lo ngumzuzu obalulekileyo waseMzantsi Afrika. Chaza ukuba isigqibo sasingacacanga: ama-Afrikaner amaninzi ayekhumbula iMfazwe yaseMzantsi Afrika ngokuchasene neBritane kwaye ayengafuni ukulwela i-British Empire. Ivoti yepalamente encinci (malunga ne-80 ku-67) yahlukanisa ilizwe. Yazisa uSmuts njengomntu wehlabathi oya kuphinda avele ekupheleni kwesi sifundo ekusekweni kweZizwe Ezimanyeneyo. [SME] Qinisekisa umgca othile wevoti (odla ngokuchazwa njenge-80-67) phambi kokupapasha.

slides.title: AbaseAfrika ekulweni
slides.lead: Ngaphezu kwabantu abangama-300,000 baseMzantsi Afrika bazithandela - kwaye ubuhlanga bubumbe indlela ababevumeleke ukukhonza ngayo.

blocks.text: Amajoni aseMzantsi Afrika anceda ekugxotheni ama-Italiane e**Mpuma Afrika (Abyssinia/Ethiopia)** ngo-1941 kwaye alwa ngamandla e**ntlango yaseMntla Afrika**. Kulo lonke izwekazi, amakhulukhulu amawaka amajoni namajoni-nesirho aseAfrika akhonza umzamo wemfazwe wama-Allies.

items: AbaseMzantsi Afrika abaNtsundu nabeBala bakhonza kwiNative Military Corps neCape Corps, kodwa urhulumente ubukhulu becala wala ukuxhobisa amajoni amnyama, ewasebenzisa njengabaqhubi, abagcini nabasebenzi.
U**Job Maseko**, ijoni elimnyama laseMzantsi Afrika, ngokudumileyo watshonisa inqanawa yaseJamani echwebeni laseTobruk waza wanikwa iMbasa Yomkhosi (Military Medal).
E**Tobruk (Juni 1942)** amawaka amajoni aseMzantsi Afrika abanjwa xa idolophu yawela emkhosini waseJamani.

media.alt: Izithunzi zamajoni ehamba kwiindunduma zentlango phantsi kwelanga elishushu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f6e2b8'/><circle cx='196' cy='40' r='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M0 120 q60 -24 120 0 t120 0 v40 H0 Z' fill='#c8a15a'/><g fill='#4a3b28'><circle cx='60' cy='96' r='8'/><rect x='54' y='104' width='12' height='24'/><circle cx='96' cy='92' r='8'/><rect x='90' y='100' width='12' height='26'/><circle cx='132' cy='96' r='8'/><rect x='126' y='104' width='12' height='24'/></g><rect x='60' y='84' width='3' height='18' fill='#4a3b28'/><rect x='96' y='80' width='3' height='18' fill='#4a3b28'/></svg>

slides.notes: Esi slide siphethe ugxininiso lwe-CAPS kuMzantsi Afrika neAfrika. Gxininisa intswela-bulungisa: abantu abamnyama baseMzantsi Afrika babeka ubomi babo esichengeni kodwa balelwa izixhobo nomvuzo olinganayo ngenxa yomgaqo-nkqubo wobuhlanga, baza babuyela ekhaya bengafumananga mvuzo. Sebenzisa uJob Maseko njengomzekelo ophathekayo, ohlala engqondweni wesibindi. Bonisa ukuba amava emfazwe, nokungabi nyani kokulwa ubuhlanga bamaNazi phesheya ngelixa ujongene nobuhlanga ekhaya, kwondla ukukhula kweentshukumo zezopolitiki zabantu abamnyama. [SME] Qinisekisa inani lonke lamavolontiya (~334,000) nenani lamabanjwa aseTobruk (POW) ngomthombo phambi kokupapasha.

slides.title: Ukuchasa imfazwe ekhaya
slides.lead: Ayingomntu wonke eMzantsi Afrika owayexhasa ama-Allies - abanye babeyincoma ngokuphandle iJamani yamaNazi.

blocks.text: I**Ossewabrandwag (OB)** yayilintshukumo enkulu yama-Afrikaner eyayichasene nemfazwe kwaye ivelana neJamani yamaNazi. Amanye amalungu enza ukonakalisa (sabotage), kwaye urhulumente wavalela (wabanjwa ngaphandle kokuxoxwa etyaleni) amakhulu awo ngexesha lemfazwe.

items: URobey Leibbrandt, owayesakuba yibhokisi yeOlimpiki, wabanjwa ezama ukulungiselela ukuchasa ngezikhali eJamani.
Olu lwahlulo lwalongeza ubuzwe bama-Afrikaner kwaye lwandla ipolitiki emva kwemfazwe.
Ngaxeshanye, abaninzi abanye baseMzantsi Afrika - beentlanga zonke - bachasa ngokuqinileyo ubufascist nobuhlanga.

media.alt: Ubume belizwe obahlulwe ngumkrwelo omagophe ube ngamacala amabini.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 40 h60 l6 20 l-6 20 l6 20 l-6 20 h-60 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M112 40 h68 v120 h-68 l6 -20 l-6 -20 l6 -20 l-6 -20 z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M106 36 l6 24 l-6 20 l6 24 l-6 24' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuba ilizwe elisemfazweni ngokunqabileyo limanyene. Amanye ama-Afrikaner ayeyibona imfazwe njengemfazwe yeBritane, ingeyoyawo, kwaye inani elincinci laxhasa ngokusebenzayo iJamani yamaNazi. Musa ukuyandisa le nto - abaninzi baseMzantsi Afrika baxhasa ama-Allies - kodwa ibalulekile kuba ezi ntshukumo zabumba ipolitiki emva koko, zondla ukunyuka kweNational Party ngo-1948 (iyunithi elandelayo). Linganisa umfanekiso ngokubiza abantu baseMzantsi Afrika abaninzi abachasa ubufascist.

slides.title: Icala lasekhaya
slides.lead: Imfazwe yatshintsha ubomi bemihla ngemihla noqoqosho kubantu abangazange bemke eMzantsi Afrika.

blocks.text: Ngokuba amadoda esemfazweni, a**basetyhini** bangena kwimisebenzi yasemafektri neyasezofisini ngamanani amakhulu. Iifektri zajika zenza izinto zemfazwe, okwakhulisa ishishini laseMzantsi Afrika kwaye kwatsala abasebenzi abaninzi abamnyama ukuza ezidolophini.

items: Iimpahla ezinjengepetroli nokutya zazinikwa ngesabelo (rationing) kwaye amaxabiso enyuka.
Ukukhula okukhawulezayo kweshishini kwandisa ukufuduka kwabaseAfrika ezidolophini nokuxinana kwiilokishi.
Ezi nguquko zexesha lemfazwe zanceda ukulungiselela imizabalazo yezopolitiki yee-1940s nee-1950s.

media.alt: Ifektri enotshimini oluqhumayo ecaleni kweekreyithi zezinto ezifumbeneyo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='24' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='30' y='70' width='90' height='50' fill='#5a6b7a'/><rect x='44' y='50' width='12' height='20' fill='#5a6b7a'/><rect x='72' y='44' width='12' height='26' fill='#5a6b7a'/><circle cx='50' cy='40' r='8' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='62' cy='32' r='10' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='80' cy='34' r='9' fill='#dcd3c2'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='150' y='96' width='30' height='24'/><rect x='182' y='96' width='30' height='24'/><rect x='166' y='72' width='30' height='24'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Nxibelelanisa imfazwe notshintsho lwezentlalo noqoqosho abafundi abanokuluqonda. Umbono ophambili kukuba imfazwe emgceni yabangela utshintsho ekhaya: umsebenzi wabasetyhini, ukukhula kweshishini, kwaye ngaphezu kwako konke iliza labasebenzi baseAfrika befudukela ezidolophini. Oku kufuduka - neemeko ezimbi ezaziza nako - kunxulumene ngqo nepolitiki yokuchasa yeyunithi elandelayo ye-CAPS ka-1948 nee-1950s.

slides.title: Indlela imfazwe eyaphela ngayo - nendleko yayo
slides.lead: Ngo-1945 amagunya e-Axis ayoyisiwe, kodwa ngeendleko ezimangalisayo zoluntu.

blocks.text: IJamani yanikezela ngo**Meyi 1945**. Ukuphelisa imfazwe ngokuchasene neJapan, i-USA yajula iibhombu zenyukliya e**Hiroshima naseNagasaki** ngo-Agasti 1945, yaza iJapan yanikezela. Yayilixesha lokuqala izixhobo zenyukliya zisetyenziswa emfazweni.

items: Kuqikelelwa ukuba abantu aba**zizigidi ezingama-60 okanye ngaphezulu** bafa - abaninzi babo babengabemi.
Inxalenye enkulu yeYurophu neAsia yayilele emabhodleni, kwaye izigidi zaba ziimbacu.
Imfazwe yashiya amagunya amabini amatsha amakhulu, i-USA neUSSR, apho ukhuphiswano lwabo laba yiMfazwe Ebandayo (Cold War).

media.alt: Ubume besixeko esaphukileyo obunehobe loxolo elibhabha phezu kwamabhodlo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='24' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#8a8f96'><rect x='24' y='80' width='24' height='40'/><path d='M56 120 v-30 l10 -8 v38 z'/><rect x='74' y='70' width='22' height='50'/><rect x='104' y='96' width='20' height='24'/><rect x='132' y='84' width='24' height='36'/></g><path d='M170 60 q18 -10 34 -2 q-10 2 -14 10 q14 -2 22 6 q-20 6 -34 -2 q-6 -6 -8 -12 z' fill='#4a5a6a'/><path d='M204 58 l14 -8 l-8 12 z' fill='#4a5a6a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Izimvo ezimbini ekufuneka zibethelelwe apha: ubungakanani bokufa (ubukhulu becala babemi abaqhelekileyo, hayi amajoni kuphela) nokufika kwexesha lenyukliya. Iibhombu zenyukliya zibhulohu eliya kwisihloko esilandelayo se-Grade 9, iXesha LeNyukliya neMfazwe Ebandayo. Qaphela ukuba inani labafileyo liqikelelo - ababhali-mbali banikela uluhlu. Gxininisa ukuba imfazwe ayizange iphelise iingxaki nje; yadala ukhuphiswano olutsha oluyingozi phakathi kwe-USA neUSSR. [SME] Iiqikelelo zenani labafileyo zisuka kuma-60 ukuya kuma-85 ezigidi; qinisekisa inani elisetyenziswa yincwadi yesikolo.

slides.title: Ukwakha ihlabathi elitsha: iZizwe Ezimanyeneyo
slides.lead: Kumabhodlo emfazwe, izizwe zazama ukwakha inkqubo yokugcina uxolo.

blocks.text: Thina zizwe zeZizwe Ezimanyeneyo sizimisele ukusindisa izizukulwana ezilandelayo kwintlekele yemfazwe...
blocks.cite: Preamble to the Charter of the United Nations, 1945

blocks.text: NgoJuni 1945, izizwe ezingama-50 zahlangana e**San Francisco** zaza zasayina iSitifiketi seSivumelwano (Charter) se**Zizwe Ezimanyeneyo (UN)**, umbutho wokusombulula iimbambano ngoxolo. INkulumbuso yaseMzantsi Afrika u**Jan Smuts** wanceda ukubhala isivulo (preamble) esidumileyo seCharter.

items: IUN yatshintshela iLeague of Nations eyaphelayo yee-1920s nee-1930s.
Ngo-1948 iUN yamkela iUniversal Declaration of Human Rights.
Ngokungalindelekanga, iUN yaza yaba lilizwi eliphambili elichasene nocalucalulo eMzantsi Afrika.

slides.notes: Phelisa isifundo ngeziphumo nethemba. Chaza ukungqubuzana okunzulu i-CAPS efuna abafundi bakuqaphele: uSmuts wanceda ekubhaleni amazwi ahle malunga nesidima somntu kwiUN, kanti urhulumente awayeyikhokela wayesahluthela amalungelo abantu abaninzi baseMzantsi Afrika ekhaya - kwaye kwakhona iUN yagxeka ucalucalulo. Le ngxaki yibhulohu enamandla eya kwiiyunithi zeendawo zoguquko zaseMzantsi Afrika. Chaza i-'preamble' njengentetho evulayo yeenjongo.

slides.title: Esikufundileyo
slides.lead: IMfazwe Yehlabathi Yesibini yayiyimfazwe yehlabathi eyabumba kwakhona ihlabathi liphela - kubandakanya noMzantsi Afrika.

blocks.text: Silandele imfazwe ukusuka kwi**zizathu** zayo (uxolo olulukhuni, iDepression nokunyuka koozwilakhe), sidlula kwiindawo zayo **zoguquko**, ubunzima be**Holocaust**, isigqibo saseMzantsi Afrika sokulwa nendima yamajoni aseAfrika, ubomi be**cala lasekhaya**, kwaye ekugqibeleni **iziphumo** nokusekwa kweZizwe Ezimanyeneyo.

blocks.question: Chaza izizathu ezibini zeMfazwe Yehlabathi Yesibini.
Kutheni u-1942 (iEl Alamein neStalingrad) echazwa njengendawo yoguquko yemfazwe?
Chaza indlela ubuhlanga obachaphazela ngayo indlela abaseMzantsi Afrika abamnyama ababevunyelwe ukuthatha inxaxheba ngayo emfazweni.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliweyo okanye ingxoxo yeklasi; ukwabiwa kwamanqaku kulandela iindlela ze-CAPS ezisekelwe kwimithombo nokubhala okwandisiweyo. Khuthaza abafundi ukuba basebenzise ubungqina obuthile (imihla, amagama afana noSmuts noJob Maseko, iindawo ezifana neTobruk). Vala ngokunxibelelanisa phambili: iziphumo zemfazwe - ukufuduka ezidolophini, ubuzwe bama-Afrikaner, iMfazwe Ebandayo neUN - zonke zingena ngqo kwiiyunithi ze-Grade 9 ezilandelayo zeXesha LeNyukliya neendawo zoguquko zaseMzantsi Afrika emva ko-1948.
